description: An understanding of the commonly used statistical language R. Topics will include using R to manipulate data and perform exploratory data analysis.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: STAT 240,301, 302,312,324,371,MATH/​STAT  310,ECON 310, GEN BUS 303, 304,306,307,317,PSYCH 210,B M E 325,I SY E 210,SOC/​C&E SOC  360, graduate/professional standing, or declared in Statistics VISP
